name: Daikoku Denki Co., Ltd.
summary: Daikoku Denki Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells computer and other information system equipment for pachinko halls in Japan. The company also develops software; and develops, manufactures, and sells units for pachinko and pachislo game machines. In addition, it provides information on pachinko halls and game machines through PC and cell-phone Web sites, and pay TV channels. The company was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
